provenance.author: verify
provenance.notes: Single rice plant, vertex-colored (2 materials, 0 textures) so webp compression is skipped. Pivot-only normalization to ground-center (~2.44m tall). Author handle pending verification on the staged model; credit in THIRD-PARTY-ASSETS.md.

lod.label: mesh-near+card-far
lod.rationale: A rice plant is dense thin blades — vertex-colored, no textures. Up close it reads as real 3D fronds (cheap mesh), but past ~25m it is indistinguishable from a flat clump, so the far band is a planned ground card, not an impostor. Mirrors the elephant-grass strategy: ground cover never warrants an octahedral impostor and culls before any far horizon band.

bands.notes: Bake a single front-view vertex-color-baked alpha ground card from the normalized rice mesh; fades out by 50m.
